desc_cristal_temps: fire power granted by the fire crystal.
desc_cristal_vitesse: fire projectiles from the fire crystal.

popup.bases_lore: The prism has shattered. Only those who master the song of colors can traverse this world.
bases_tuto: - Catch potions to change your color.
- You can only touch black blocks or blocks of your color.
- Other blocks are immaterial: you will pass through them.
- Reach the yellow portal to escape.
popup.blocs_lore: Some fragments of the world refuse to stay still, animated by residual magic.
blocs_tuto: - They can carry you if they are black or your color.
- Don't get crushed and don't fall into the void!
popup.sorcier_lore: Mages corrupted by obsidian. They channel their hatred as spectral skulls.
popup.garde_lore: Ancient guards raised by the void. They patrol endlessly, striking any intruder.
popup.slimes_lore: Condensed magic residues. Their cores are hard, but their bodies are elastic.
popup.cristal_lore: A burning crystal, residue of ancient magic. It grants mysterious fiery powers.
popup.brasier_lore: Eternal flames burst from the ground, remnants of Pyros's fury.
popup.butin_lore: When dying, creatures sometimes release the energy they had absorbed.
popup.demon_lore: A creature from the abyss that glides relentlessly, its gaze fixed on its prey.
popup.pyrolord_lore: A small ember slime hops at the bottom of the lair. It looks harmless... really?
pyrolord_tuto: - Something hides beneath this fiery shell...
- Wake it up by jumping on it or shooting it.
- It is fast and can surprise you if you are not careful.
popup.import_titre: Do you really want to import
popup.import_warn: Your current save will be overwritten.
popup.param_titre: Do you really want to reset
popup.reset_titre: Do you really want to reset
sorcier_tuto: - It stays still but attacks from a distance.
- It shoots cursed skulls in a straight line.
- Any contact with it or its skulls will be fatal.
- Find the right timing to slip between shots!
garde_tuto: - This soldier constantly walks back and forth.
- If you touch it, it's the end.
- Jump over it or get behind it!
slimes_tuto: - Bounce on their heads to reach higher places.
- Green: Fragile, 1 bounce is enough to destroy them.
- Purple: Tough, it takes 2 bounces to destroy them.
- Warning: touching a slime anywhere but the head is fatal!
cristal_tuto: - Catch the crystal to obtain the power of fire.
- You will be able to shoot flames at enemies.
- Warning: you cannot keep this power forever.
brasier_tuto: - Fire is deadly on contact, just like spikes.
- No color protects you: it burns everything.
- Jump over it or go around it!
butin_tuto: - Some enemies drop an item when they die.
- Coins, potions, or fire crystals... Anything can drop.
- Eliminate them to collect their loot.
- Loot appears where the enemy perished.
demon_tuto: - It flies and always faces you.
- Every 3 seconds, it shoots or charges straight at you.
- Touching it is fatal: dodge its charge and projectiles.
- Shoot it, three hits are enough to take it down.
pyrolord_lore2: - Something hides beneath this fiery shell...
- Wake it up by jumping on it or shooting it.
- It is fast and can surprise you if you are not careful.

lignes: - The game is now playable in your browser! (available on Itch.io)
- Mobile and tablet support with integrated touch gamepad.
- Improvement: loot now avoids falling into obstacles.
